title: selaginella cataractarum
intro: Selaginella cataractarum, also known as Cataract Fern, is a type of fern that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae and is native to tropical regions. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Selaginella cataractarum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
